buggy_variants.description: Evicts boundary timestamp by using <= instead of < in cutoff test
Rejects equal timestamps by requiring strictly increasing add order
count(ts=None) incorrectly recomputes using latest-1 instead of latest
Zero-count add still appends a bucket, affecting later merging behavior
Future count(ts) incorrectly returns current total instead of filtering by ts
Negative counts are accepted and subtract from total instead of raising
